title: Found Footage: The Backrooms
description: The Found Footage mod by SpacePotato made perfect!
body:
# Found Footage: The Backrooms
A modpack designed to make the [Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-found-footage) experience as polished as possible.

## What this pack adds
- A new custom main menu.
- Easy ways to play with friends.
- Proximity Voice Chat.
- Optimised performance.
- Removes annoying pop-ups which can take you out of the immersion.

## How to play
To enter the backrooms, you need to get inside the Minecraft terrain. This can be done by dropping sand or gravel on you, or by pushing a block into yourself or vice versa.

You have a flashlight you can activate with R.
And make sure to configure Simple Voice Chat with V.
